title: callicarpa oligantha
intro: Callicarpa oligantha, also known as the purple plumier or purple callicarpa, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Asia, known for its vibrant purple flowers and deep purple berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. Callicarpa oligantha can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function.
